properties.body: NAVAREA XX 86/26 BARENTS AND WHITE SEAS AND CHYOSHSKAYA GUBA CHART RUS 10100. 1. MISSILE FIRINGS 0400 TO 1700 UTC DAILY 19 TO 21 JUN NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREAS BOUNDED BY: A. 68-58.0N 038-52.0E, 68-41.0N 040-28.0E, 68-03.0N 042-10.0E, 66-48.0N 041-10.0E, 67-37.0N 040-06.0E, 68-01.0N 040-58.0E, 68-23.0N 040-03.0E, 68-40.0N 038-26.0E, EXCLUDING THE COASTAL PART. B. 68-38.0N 046-32.0E, 68-24.0N 048-03.0E, 67-49.0N 048-56.0E, THEN COASTAL LINE TO 67-19.0N 044-54.0E, 67-34.3N 045-13.0E, THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-22.0N 046-12.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 211800 UTC JUN 26.= NNNN
